'''chazufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vac|vac]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vac|vac]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chazufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæzifith|chæzifith]] || [[word:chæzifij|chæzifij]] || [[word:chæzifish|chæzifish]] || [[word:chæzifi|chæzifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazuzufuth|chazuzufuth]] || [[word:chazuzufuj|chazuzufuj]] || [[word:chazuzufush|chazuzufush]] || [[word:chazuzufu|chazuzufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazufuth|chazufuth]] || [[word:chazufuj|chazufuj]] || [[word:chazufush|chazufush]] || [[word:chazufu|chazufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazuffuth|chazuffuth]] || [[word:chazuffuj|chazuffuj]] || [[word:chazuffush|chazuffush]] || [[word:chazuffuf|chazuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chazufuthu|chazufuthu]] || [[word:chazufuju|chazufuju]] || [[word:chazufushu|chazufushu]] || [[word:chazufuku|chazufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chazufuth|chazufuth]] || [[word:chazufuj|chazufuj]] || [[word:chazufush|chazufush]] || [[word:chazufu|chazufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chazufuthul|chazufuthul]] || [[word:chazufujul|chazufujul]] || [[word:chazufushul|chazufushul]] || [[word:chazufukul|chazufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chazufuthuthu|chazufuthuthu]] || [[word:chazufujuju|chazufujuju]] || [[word:chazufushushu|chazufushushu]] || [[word:chazufuku|chazufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chazufuthun|chazufuthun]] || [[word:chazufujun|chazufujun]] || [[word:chazufushun|chazufushun]] || [[word:chazufukun|chazufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chazufuthuoro|chazufuthuoro]] || [[word:chazufujuoro|chazufujuoro]] || [[word:chazufushuoro|chazufushuoro]] || [[word:chazufukuoro|chazufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
